description: Software engineer in Beijing, originally from Chengdu. Guitar player and hiker.

voice_lines.hobby: 我平时喜欢弹吉他和爬山。

discoverable_facts.identity: 我的名字是我奶奶给我取的，因为她希望我将来聪明能干。
discoverable_facts.family: 我有一个姐姐，她住在成都，我们每个月视频聊天。
discoverable_facts.family_size: 我们家四口人——我、爸妈还有姐姐。
discoverable_facts.family_siblings: 我有一个姐姐，她住在成都，我们每个月视频聊天。
discoverable_facts.family_live: 我在北京工作，姐姐和爸妈都在成都，不住在一起，不过经常联系。
discoverable_facts.work: 我在一家做人工智能的公司工作，主要负责语音识别项目。
discoverable_facts.hobby: 我从高中开始学吉他，断断续续学了差不多十年了。
discoverable_facts.travel: 我去过日本、泰国和韩国，最喜欢日本的拉面和温泉。
discoverable_facts.place: 我老家是成都，但毕业后来北京工作，住在中关村附近。
discoverable_facts.food: 我妈妈做的回锅肉是我最喜欢的，每次回成都都要吃。
discoverable_facts.work_company: 我在中关村一家做人工智能的公司工作，大概两百人左右的规模。
discoverable_facts.work_origin: 大学学计算机，喜欢写代码，毕业就进了这行，没有特别想过做别的。
discoverable_facts.hobby_best: 弹吉他最好的感觉是弹出一首熟悉的曲子，别人能听出来是什么，很有满足感。
discoverable_facts.hobby_origin: 高中时候一个朋友会弹吉他，觉得很酷，就借了他的吉他自己摸索，后来正式学了。
discoverable_facts.travel_with: 一般跟朋友或者同事一起，很少一个人去，一个人会有点无聊。

discoverable_facts_en.identity: My grandmother gave me my name.
discoverable_facts_en.family_size: Four of us — me, my parents, and my older sister.
discoverable_facts_en.family_siblings: I have an older sister — she lives in Chengdu.
discoverable_facts_en.family_live: I work in Beijing; my sister and parents are in Chengdu. We're not together but we're always in touch.
discoverable_facts_en.work: I work at an AI company.
discoverable_facts_en.work_company: I work at an AI company in Zhongguancun, Beijing — around two hundred people.
discoverable_facts_en.work_origin: I studied computer science and went straight into the industry after graduation — never really considered anything else.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby: I started learning guitar in high school.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby_best: The best feeling is playing a song people recognise — very satisfying.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby_origin: A friend in high school played guitar — I borrowed his and taught myself, then properly learned.
discoverable_facts_en.travel_with: Usually with friends or colleagues — it gets a bit boring alone.
discoverable_facts_en.food: My mum's twice-cooked pork is my favourite.

voice_lines_en.family: There are just three of us in my family.
voice_lines_en.hobby: I usually enjoy playing guitar and hiking.
voice_lines_en.travel: I've been to a few Asian countries.
voice_lines_en.place: I've lived in Beijing for five years.
